arts.ttl: Arsenal Isak LATEST, Man Utd eye WONDERKID, Chelsea line up SWAP transfer: FT Recap
arts.sum: Arsenal Isak LATEST, Man Utd eye WONDERKID, Chelsea line up SWAP transfer: FT Recap The January transfer window may have just closed but the news continues to develop as teams prepare for the remainder of the season and make plans for the summer.

arts.ttl: Wales and Man Utd great Hughes named Carlisle boss
arts.sum: League Two's bottom side Carlisle United have appointed former Wales manager Mark Hughes as their new head coach.

arts.ttl: Man Utd target 'relieved' Arsenal January transfer fell through
arts.sum: And GIVEMESPORT have now claimed that Nypan is ‘relieved’ by his choice to reject the Gunners, although he is open to a move to the club in the summer. Arsenal opted against making any short-term signings, with the club only willing to move for players whom they felt could be a long-term benefit to Mikel Arteta, such as teenage sensation Sverre Halseth Nypan .

arts.ttl: Antony breaks silence over 'difficult' Man Utd transfer
arts.sum: Antony has opened up on his decision to leave Manchester United last month, admitting he had ‘difficult times’ during his time with the club. Now it is time to work to be in my best version and help the club in everything.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy has confirmed three Leicester City selection decisions vs Man United
arts.sum: Manchester United host Leicester City in the FA Cup fourth round on Friday, as Ruud van Nistelrooy prepares to make an emotional return to Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester United vs. Leicester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Friday's FA Cup clash between Manchester United and Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Ineos are about to show Man United their true colours with £54m Harry Kane transfer decision
arts.sum: Man United have been heavily linked with Harry Kane in the past when he was playing for Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford has one-word verdict after Ruben Amorim's second brutal decision
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's relationship with Ruben Amorim quickly deteriorated as he was left out of all but one of his matchday squads since giving a bombshell revealing he wanted to leave Manchester United in December

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy disagrees with Gary Neville over Man Utd assessment
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker and interim boss Ruud van Nistelrooy returns to Old Trafford on Friday night looking to turn around his fortunes in charge of Leicester City

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has hinted at his Man United job security and Ineos must act fast
arts.sum: Manchester United find themselves in a desperate period but surely Ruben Amorim's hints at his job being in peril are premature?
